title: BLOCK 4 FINAL: Speed mastery
description: Block 4 final — 85 WPM on a real news/blog hybrid passage
text: After eighteen months of beta testing, the platform officially launched on Monday with over 200,000 sign-ups in the first 24 hours. Early reviews from creators have been overwhelmingly positive: "This finally feels like a tool built by people who actually use it," wrote one popular reviewer. Investors are watching closely.
tips: 🎓 Teen Block 4 done! 85 WPM on real news/blog
From here, Block 5 = practical school + final exam
L75 is the course final at 95 WPM
